feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Dow Wipes Out 2020 Losses

link.title: Dow Wipes Out 2020 Losses

entry.content:
On Thursday, the Dow Jones industrial average erased its 2020 losses.
Business Insider reports that stocks rallied on the Federal Reserve’s new monetary policy framework.
The 30-stock index gained as much as 1.1% in the session.
Microsoft and Walmart led the index higher following news of their joint bid for TikTok.
The Dow has lagged its peers in turning positive for the year, largely due to its smaller exposure to rallying tech giants.
The industrial average now sits roughly 1,000 points away from notching a record high.
entry.summary: On Thursday, the Dow Jones industrial average erased its 2020 losses. Business Insider reports that stocks rallied on the Federal Reserve’s new monetary policy framework. The 30-stock index gained as much as 1.1% in the session. Microsoft and Walmart led the index higher following news of their joint bid for TikTok. The Dow has lagged its peers in turning positive for the year, largely due to its smaller exposure to rallying tech giants. The industrial average now sits roughly 1,000 points away from notching a record high.

entry.title: Warga Pesisir Jember Ramai Selfie Dengan Bangkai Hiu Tutul Terdampar

link.title: Warga Pesisir Jember Ramai Selfie Dengan Bangkai Hiu Tutul Terdampar

entry.content:
Jember, KompasTV Jawa Timur. - Warga pesisir pantai Paseban, Jember, Jawa Timur, dihebohkan dengan terdamparnya seekor Hiu tutul dengan panjang kurang lebih 10 meter dan berat 1,5 ton.
Penemuan ini membuat warga berbondong-bondong menyaksikan dari dekat dan menjadi ajang swafoto Hiu malang tersebut.
Bahkan sejumlah warga terlihat naik ke atas ikan Hiu yang telah menjadi bangkai tersebut.
Ikan Hiu tutul dengan nama latin rhyncodon typus yang masuk dalam status konservasi satwa dilindungi ini diduga terbawa arus laut pantai selatan.
Sebelum ditemukan, Hiu tutul ini sudah mati dan berada di pesisir pantai dengan sejumlah luka di tubuhnya, diduga karena benturan batu yang berada di pesisir pantai.
Petugas gabungan Tim tanggap bencana dibantu warga setempat langsung menguburkan bangkai Hiu tutul tersebut agar tidak menimbulkan bau menyengat dan berbagai penyakit.
#Jember #Jatim #Hiu #Tutul #rhyncodon #typus #Pantai #Cuaca #Buruk
MEDIA SOSIAL KOMPAS TV JAWA TIMUR :
facebook :
instagram :
twitter :
entry.summary: Jember, KompasTV Jawa Timur. - Warga pesisir pantai Paseban, Jember, Jawa Timur, dihebohkan dengan terdamparnya seekor Hiu tutul dengan panjang kurang lebih 10 meter dan berat 1,5 ton. Penemuan ini membuat warga berbondong-bondong menyaksikan dari dekat dan menjadi ajang swafoto Hiu malang tersebut. Bahkan sejumlah warga terlihat naik ke atas ikan Hiu yang telah menjadi bangkai tersebut. Ikan Hiu tutul dengan nama latin rhyncodon typus yang masuk dalam status konservasi satwa dilindungi ini diduga terbawa arus laut pantai selatan. Sebelum ditemukan, Hiu tutul ini sudah mati dan berada di pesisir pantai dengan sejumlah luka di tubuhnya, diduga karena benturan batu yang berada di pesisir pantai. Petugas gabungan Tim tanggap bencana dibantu warga setempat langsung menguburkan bangkai Hiu tutul tersebut agar tidak menimbulkan bau menyengat dan berbagai penyakit. #Jember #Jatim #Hiu #Tutul #rhyncodon #typus #Pantai #Cuaca #Buruk MEDIA SOSIAL KOMPAS TV JAWA TIMUR : facebook : instagram : twitter :

entry.title: Longkhong series eps 8 SUB INDONESIA

link.title: Longkhong series eps 8 SUB INDONESIA

entry.content:
DIMOHON UNTUK TIDAK UPLOAD ULANG DI TEMPAT LAIN
Kalo mau share cukup share link daily motionnya.
Apabila ada yang menemukan video ini selain di akun chocoreociz, harap lapor melalui instagram chocoreociz_
Mohon maaf apabila ada kesalahan kata, selamat menonton! :)
Jangan lupa follow instagram chocoreociz_ untuk info update episode berikutnya, thank you!

entry.title: Guy Takes Shot and Kicks Basketball Directly Into Basket of Opposite Pole

link.title: Guy Takes Shot and Kicks Basketball Directly Into Basket of Opposite Pole

entry.content: This guy did an amazing basketball trick. He slam-dunked and kicked the basketball when it got through the net. Surprisingly, the ball went directly into the basket on the opposite pole.
entry.summary: This guy did an amazing basketball trick. He slam-dunked and kicked the basketball when it got through the net. Surprisingly, the ball went directly into the basket on the opposite pole.

entry.title: #TDF2020 - Étape 8 Stage 8 - Powless rate son virage Powless misses the turn

link.title: #TDF2020 - Étape 8 Stage 8 - Powless rate son virage Powless misses the turn

entry.content:
Initialement prévu du 27 juin au 19 juillet, le Tour de France se déroulera sur le parcours prévu, sans changement, de Nice à Paris, du samedi 29 août au dimanche 20 septembre 2020. L’accent est mis sur une visite de l’ensemble des massifs montagneux du territoire : l’étalement, la variété et la raideur atypique des ascensions mettront à disposition des grimpeurs ambitieux des opportunités tout au long de l’épreuve, de l’arrivée d’Orcières-Merlette au chrono de la Planche-des-Belles-Filles, en passant par le Puy Mary, le Grand Colombier ou le col de la Loze en surplomb de Méribel.
The Tour de France 2020 defining characteristic is the inclusion of all the mountain ranges in France. The spread-out, varied and exceptionally steep climbs will give ambitious climbers one opportunity after another throughout the race, from the finish at Orcières-Merlette to the time trial on La Planche des Belles Filles, not to mention the Puy Mary, the Grand Colombier and the Col de la Loze, overhanging Méribel.
Plus d’informations sur / More information on:
Hashtag officiel / Official Hashtag: #TDF2020
© Amaury Sport Organisation - www.aso.fr
entry.summary: Initialement prévu du 27 juin au 19 juillet, le Tour de France se déroulera sur le parcours prévu, sans changement, de Nice à Paris, du samedi 29 août au dimanche 20 septembre 2020. L’accent est mis sur une visite de l’ensemble des massifs montagneux du territoire : l’étalement, la variété et la raideur atypique des ascensions mettront à disposition des grimpeurs ambitieux des opportunités tout au long de l’épreuve, de l’arrivée d’Orcières-Merlette au chrono de la Planche-des-Belles-Filles, en passant par le Puy Mary, le Grand Colombier ou le col de la Loze en surplomb de Méribel. The Tour de France 2020 defining characteristic is the inclusion of all the mountain ranges in France. The spread-out, varied and exceptionally steep climbs will give ambitious climbers one opportunity after another throughout the race, from the finish at Orcières-Merlette to the time trial on La Planche des Belles Filles, not to mention the Puy Mary, the Grand Colombier and the Col de la Loze, overhanging Méribel. Plus d’informations sur / More information on: Hashtag officiel / Official Hashtag: #TDF2020 © Amaury Sport Organisation - www.aso.fr

entry.title: The Beechgrove Garden episode 21 2020

link.title: The Beechgrove Garden episode 21 2020

entry.content:
The Beechgrove Garden episode 21 2020: George has taken cuttings from everything from clematis to pineberries and now that they have rooted, he demonstrates what to do next. Kirsty has filled her flat with houseplants so she is looking for clever ways to display them and has a go at using a head planter to unusual and amusing effect. Sophie is back in her allotment with ideas of how to make the most of the harvest.
Last gardening post on HDclump.com:
entry.summary: The Beechgrove Garden episode 21 2020: George has taken cuttings from everything from clematis to pineberries and now that they have rooted, he demonstrates what to do next. Kirsty has filled her flat with houseplants so she is looking for clever ways to display them and has a go at using a head planter to unusual and amusing effect. Sophie is back in her allotment with ideas of how to make the most of the harvest. Last gardening post on HDclump.com:

entry.title: Madam Sir Latest Full Episode 4 September 2020 Episode 61

link.title: Madam Sir Latest Full Episode 4 September 2020 Episode 61

entry.content:
About The Show:
—————————–
Set in Lucknow the show is based in one such all-women Police station made by 4 beautiful quirky women. Pushpa, the oldest of them, is the head constable who tries to balance her life between home and work. Karishma, the Sub Inspector, is fish out of the water as she is at loggerheads with the philosophy of the police station. She beats before she talks but now she has to solve all cases through reconciliation. Santosh Sharma is the young new recruit and a typical lonely girl in the city. The head of the pack is S.H.O Haseena Mallik, witty, romantic leads by example. The common challenge for all these women is to bring sensitivity to their policing while dealing with cases that come to this police station. Hence their solution is most unusual. The characters and the cases add to the fun and humour of the show. While Pushpa and Karishma are the saas-bahu duo, who keep us entertained by their Squabbles, it is Haseena - Karishma’s ideological differences which add to the drama and comedy. #maddamsir

Pushpa, the oldest of them, is the head constable who tries to balance her life between home and work. Karishma, the Sub Inspector, is fish out of the water as she is at loggerheads with the philosophy of the police station. She beats before she talks but now she has to solve all cases through reconciliation. Santosh Sharma is the young new recruit and a typical lonely girl in the city. The head of the pack is S.H.O Haseena Mallik, witty, romantic leads by example. The common challenge for all these women is to bring sensitivity to their policing while dealing with cases that come to this police station. Hence their solution is most unusual. The characters and the cases add to the fun and humour of the show. While Pushpa and Karishma are the saas-bahu duo, who keep us entertained by their Squabbles, it is Haseena - Karishma’s ideological differences which add to the drama and comedy. #maddamsir madam entry.title: Drunk Girl Falls in Her Puke

link.title: Drunk Girl Falls in Her Puke

entry.content:
This drunk girl bent as she was puking in a corner. Unfortunately, she lost balance and fell in her puke. Thankfully, a guy passing by helped her to get up post her fall.
*The underlying music rights are not available for license. For use of the video with the track(s) contained therein, please contact the music publisher(s) or relevant rightsholder(s).
entry.summary: This drunk girl bent as she was puking in a corner. Unfortunately, she lost balance and fell in her puke. Thankfully, a guy passing by helped her to get up post her fall. *The underlying music rights are not available for license. For use of the video with the track(s) contained therein, please contact the music publisher(s) or relevant rightsholder(s).

entry.title: மூலிகை பெட்ரோலுக்கு கார்ப்பரேட் எதிர்ப்பு கிடையாது.. மத்திய அமைச்சர்கள் சிலர்தான்.. ராமர் பரபர பேச்சு

entry.title: Good news: Ambala woman turns Covid crisis into opportunity

link.title: Good news: Ambala woman turns Covid crisis into opportunity

entry.content: In our good news today, we have a story from Ambala where a woman has turned COVID crisis into an opportunity. Amanpreet Kaur, who is a fashion designer, now sells designer masks that are selling like hotcakes.
entry.summary: In our good news today, we have a story from Ambala where a woman has turned COVID crisis into an opportunity. Amanpreet Kaur, who is a fashion designer, now sells designer masks that are selling like hotcakes.

entry.title: This compostable face mask could tackle plastic waste dilemma

link.title: This compostable face mask could tackle plastic waste dilemma

entry.content:
A French company that specialises in hemp canvas is marketing what it claims are the first 100% compostable masks in Europe.
Costing 65 cents each, they have already been ordered in their hundreds of thousands by companies and local authorities across Europe.
––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
Leave a like to support us! Subscribe to our channel and press the bell icon to be the first to watch our videos on YouTube.
––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

Donate to us to show your support and help us sustain as an independent online news portal that delivers breaking news.

entry.title: Hand of the Patriarch - Wasteland 3 - MAN AT ARMS- REFORGED

link.title: Hand of the Patriarch - Wasteland 3 - MAN AT ARMS- REFORGED

entry.content:
This video was sponsored by Xbox Game Pass for PC.Wasteland 3, a new role-playing game, just launched on Xbox Game Pass for PC. Check out the link below to learn more about the game and Xbox Game Pass for PC:
Watch as the blacksmiths of Baltimore Knife and Sword build the Hand of the Patriarch from Wasteland 3.
Dont forget about the Behind the Scenes video -
Dont forget to subscribe to see more videos on the AWE Me Channel!
Filmed on location at Baltimore Knife and Sword , hosts of Man At Arms
Cast
Kerry Stagmer - Swordsmith
John Mitchell - Shop Foreman/Lead Fabricator
Bill Collison - Swordmaker
Rick Janney - Blademaker
Ferenc Gregor – Carving and design
Tanner Saslow - Machinist
Sam Salvati - Blacksmith
Kevin O’Hern - Blacksmith
Dave Reiter - Fabricator
Ellen Durkan - Blacksmith/Designer
Derick Kemper - Blacksmith/Knifemaker
Episode Produced and Directed By
Executive producer - Kerry Stagmer

Director - CJ Schmidt

Art - Casey Kaleba -
PA - Mike Chang
PA - Chris Bartlett

BTS - Mahendra Khera
Produced for the Awe Me Channel by That’s How I Do It, LLC
Executive producer/Brand manager - Kerry Stagmer

Check out the link below to learn more about the game and Xbox Game Pass for PC: Watch as the blacksmiths of Baltimore Knife and Sword build the Hand of the Patriarch from Wasteland 3. entry.title: Florian Thauvin savoure son retour très remarqué

link.title: Florian Thauvin savoure son retour très remarqué

entry.content: Titularisé avec l’OM pour la première fois depuis plus d’un an, le milieu offensif a été l’un des hommes du match contre Brest (3-2) avec un but et deux passes décisives. Un véritable soulagement pour lui.
entry.summary: Titularisé avec l’OM pour la première fois depuis plus d’un an, le milieu offensif a été l’un des hommes du match contre Brest (3-2) avec un but et deux passes décisives. Un véritable soulagement pour lui.

entry.title: The Turnaround Over the Coverage On Sushant Singh’s Mental Health The Quint

link.title: The Turnaround Over the Coverage On Sushant Singh’s Mental Health The Quint

entry.content: Over the last couple of days the biggest turnaround in the Sushant Singh Rajput case has been regarding information about the actor’s mental health. Here’s what we have been hearing so far from his friends, family and the media at large.
entry.summary: Over the last couple of days the biggest turnaround in the Sushant Singh Rajput case has been regarding information about the actor’s mental health. Here’s what we have been hearing so far from his friends, family and the media at large.

entry.title: Toyota GR Factory Movie

link.title: Toyota GR Factory Movie

entry.content: The production of the new GR Yaris will be carried out at the GR FACTORY, a dedicated production line that has been established at Toyota’s Motomachi Plant which has a long and solid track record of manufacturing sports cars. This line produces high quality rigid bodies, assembles engines and strives for racing car quality through careful construction by the hands of highly skilled technicians, also called ‘Takumi’ team members. As a result, the GR Yaris is built with meticulous care and attention.
entry.summary: The production of the new GR Yaris will be carried out at the GR FACTORY, a dedicated production line that has been established at Toyota’s Motomachi Plant which has a long and solid track record of manufacturing sports cars. This line produces high quality rigid bodies, assembles engines and strives for racing car quality through careful construction by the hands of highly skilled technicians, also called ‘Takumi’ team members. As a result, the GR Yaris is built with meticulous care and attention.

entry.title: #TDF2020 - Étape 8 Stage 8 - 13 riders in the break 13 coureurs dans l’échappée

link.title: #TDF2020 - Étape 8 Stage 8 - 13 riders in the break 13 coureurs dans l’échappée

entry.content:
Initialement prévu du 27 juin au 19 juillet, le Tour de France se déroulera sur le parcours prévu, sans changement, de Nice à Paris, du samedi 29 août au dimanche 20 septembre 2020. L’accent est mis sur une visite de l’ensemble des massifs montagneux du territoire : l’étalement, la variété et la raideur atypique des ascensions mettront à disposition des grimpeurs ambitieux des opportunités tout au long de l’épreuve, de l’arrivée d’Orcières-Merlette au chrono de la Planche-des-Belles-Filles, en passant par le Puy Mary, le Grand Colombier ou le col de la Loze en surplomb de Méribel.
The Tour de France 2020 defining characteristic is the inclusion of all the mountain ranges in France. The spread-out, varied and exceptionally steep climbs will give ambitious climbers one opportunity after another throughout the race, from the finish at Orcières-Merlette to the time trial on La Planche des Belles Filles, not to mention the Puy Mary, the Grand Colombier and the Col de la Loze, overhanging Méribel.
Plus d’informations sur / More information on:
Hashtag officiel / Official Hashtag: #TDF2020
© Amaury Sport Organisation - www.aso.fr
entry.summary: Initialement prévu du 27 juin au 19 juillet, le Tour de France se déroulera sur le parcours prévu, sans changement, de Nice à Paris, du samedi 29 août au dimanche 20 septembre 2020. L’accent est mis sur une visite de l’ensemble des massifs montagneux du territoire : l’étalement, la variété et la raideur atypique des ascensions mettront à disposition des grimpeurs ambitieux des opportunités tout au long de l’épreuve, de l’arrivée d’Orcières-Merlette au chrono de la Planche-des-Belles-Filles, en passant par le Puy Mary, le Grand Colombier ou le col de la Loze en surplomb de Méribel. The Tour de France 2020 defining characteristic is the inclusion of all the mountain ranges in France. The spread-out, varied and exceptionally steep climbs will give ambitious climbers one opportunity after another throughout the race, from the finish at Orcières-Merlette to the time trial on La Planche des Belles Filles, not to mention the Puy Mary, the Grand Colombier and the Col de la Loze, overhanging Méribel. Plus d’informations sur / More information on: Hashtag officiel / Official Hashtag: #TDF2020 © Amaury Sport Organisation - www.aso.fr

link.title: Alia Bhatt shares sunkissed photo

entry.content: Actress Alia Bhatt might be getting trolled for her upcoming movie, Sadak 2, but she seems determined to keep her face towards the sunshine.

entry.title: Mental health matters: Suicide, depression, bipolar disorder, more What experts say

link.title: Mental health matters: Suicide, depression, bipolar disorder, more What experts say

entry.content: Can you look at someone and say if he/she is depressed? What is bipolar disorder? How media can help promote mental awareness? Why is it necessary to attend to mental health problem? Is mental illness real? Watch the full show as experts talk about the common misconceptions.
entry.summary: Can you look at someone and say if he/she is depressed? What is bipolar disorder? How media can help promote mental awareness? Why is it necessary to attend to mental health problem? Is mental illness real? Watch the full show as experts talk about the common misconceptions.

entry.title: Afghanistan விவகாரத்தில் தலையிடும் China! Indiaவுக்கு நெருக்கடி

link.title: Afghanistan விவகாரத்தில் தலையிடும் China! Indiaவுக்கு நெருக்கடி

entry.content:
இந்தியா, சீனா இடையே ஏற்கனவே பனிப்போர் நடந்து வரும் நிலையில் ஆப்கானிஸ்தான் விவகாரங்களில் மூக்கை நுழைக்க பீஜிங் முயற்சித்து வருவது டெல்லிக்கு நெருக்கடியை ஏற்படுத்தி உள்ளது. இதுமட்டுமில்லை அமெரிக்காவுக்கும் எச்சரிக்கையாக இது அமைந்துள்ளது.
Pakistan has invited China to end the fight in Afghanistan
entry.summary: இந்தியா, சீனா இடையே ஏற்கனவே பனிப்போர் நடந்து வரும் நிலையில் ஆப்கானிஸ்தான் விவகாரங்களில் மூக்கை நுழைக்க பீஜிங் முயற்சித்து வருவது டெல்லிக்கு நெருக்கடியை ஏற்படுத்தி உள்ளது. இதுமட்டுமில்லை அமெரிக்காவுக்கும் எச்சரிக்கையாக இது அமைந்துள்ளது. Pakistan has invited China to end the fight in Afghanistan
